name: langguard-arbiter
description: LangGuard Arbiter — in-harness agent policy enforcement for Cursor. Screens, enforces, and evidences every MCP tool call against your LangGuard policies at the pre-action seam (beforeMCPExecution). Deterministic ALLOW / DENY / ESCALATE — ESCALATE surfaces as Cursor's native Ask approval prompt. Native shell gets a best-effort catastrophic-command deny (beforeShellExecution); afterMCPExecution and stop are advisory. No LLM in the enforcement loop. Disclosure: the bundled hook shim spawns a local background policy daemon (loopback port 52746, shared with the LangGuard Claude Code and Codex plugins) and on first run downloads a SHA-256-pinned Open Policy Agent binary (checksums bundled in opa/opa-checksums.json); policy logic stays server-side in your LangGuard tenant.
